abilities.name: 자연회복
abilities.description: 배틀에서 일단 물러나면 상태 이상이 회복된다.

flavorTexts.text: When its group is attacked, Pawmo is the first to leap into battle, defeating enemies with a fighting technique that utilizes electric shocks.
Pawmo uses a unique fighting technique in which it uses its forepaws to strike foes and zap them with electricity from its paw pads simultaneously.
